title: geraniospermum capillare
intro: Geraniospermum capillare, also known as the Himalayan geranium, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geraniospermum capillare include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
